channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Flash flood warnings issued for parts of New York City and Northeast as heat wave breaks
item.description: Heavy rain and flooding are breaking a heat wave that gripped New York City and much of the Northeast last week.

item.title: National Guard members on patrol in Memphis fatally shoot man during pursuit, police say
Prosecutors push for a trial for the man accused of killing Charlie Kirk
